source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The signal flow graph of a system is shown below. \( U(s) \) is the input and \( C(s) \) is the output. Assuming \( h_1 = b_1 \) and \( h_0 = b_0 - b_1a_1 \), the input-output transfer function \( G(s) = \frac{C(s)}{U(s)} \) of the system is given by:

verifiability: answer is a precise closed-form transfer function expression
choices provide explicit candidate formulas, making correctness check straightforward
